seo.title: Money Tools — free financial calculators
seo.description: Free money calculators to plan your retirement, emergency fund, and savings goals. Built by diBoaS.

hero.headline: What could your money do?
hero.subtitle: A small set of free calculators. Plug in your numbers, see what's possible.

grow.title: Grow what you have
grow.question: If I save $X, what does it become?

protect.title: Don't lose to inflation
protect.question: What is sitting in cash actually costing me?

business.title: For your business
business.question: What's my company leaving on the table?

calculatorMode.retrospectiveHint: Retrospective mode walks the actual FX path back up to {years} years. Bank scenario stays in local currency.

scenarios.conservativeTooltip: Long-run conservative digital-dollar yield envelope, reflecting top-tier passive rates available in 2026.
scenarios.historicalTooltip: Multi-asset diBoaS strategy envelope based on the long-run 1928–2024 S&P 500 total-return CAGR.
scenarios.optimisticTooltip: Trailing 10-year multi-asset strategy envelope reflecting post-2014 market conditions.

disclaimer: Educational projection only. Annual percentage yield (APY) shown for deposit accounts. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results. All investments involve risk; you may lose money. diBoaS is not a registered investment adviser. diBoaS returns are shown in digital dollar; for non-US currencies, the local-currency total combines the dollar return with how your local currency typically moves against the US dollar over time.

warnings.over30Years: This target takes more than 30 years to reach at your current contribution. Consider increasing your monthly amount or extending your timeline.
